last_verdict: Round-6 ARIS fixes: adapter round-trip prefix handling, BGD/similarity aggregation over all layers, full 12-domain evaluation coverage, unit tests added.
fixes_in_round_6: from_state_dict() strips leading 'base_model.model.' prefix on load — prevents double-prefix on round-trip
to_state_dict() guards against double-prefix when internal keys already contain the prefix
compute_bgd_matrix() aggregates over ALL shared layers (was capped at 5)
compute_similarity_matrix() aggregates over ALL shared layers (was using first layer only)
Removed misleading num_sample_layers parameter from top-level compute_bgd_matrix()
eval_domain_accuracy.py default changed from CORE_EVAL_DOMAINS (6) to ALL_EVAL_DOMAINS (all 12)
Added creative_writing and translation as synthetic benchmarks in DOMAIN_BENCHMARKS
domains.yaml marks creative_writing and translation with eval_mode: synthetic
Created tests/test_text2subspace.py: adapter round-trip, BGD all-layers, similarity all-layers, domain coverage, GrassMerge sanity
